news.headline: Harbour BioMed partners with AstraZeneca for therapeutic antibodies - March 21, 2025, HKEX: 02142, aims to develop novel therapies in immunology & oncology.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, Harbour BioMed, a biopharmaceutical company operating in Shanghai, Cambridge, and Rotterdam, declared its mission to develop and market innovative antibody therapeutics in the fields of immunology and oncology. The company, listed on HKEX as 02142, is dedicated to discovering new treatments for various diseases.

news.headline: Honesty and frequent feedback lead to better results in teams, improving problem-solving skills.
news.summary: Effectively sharing feedback and practicing transparency within your team is crucial for maximizing productivity and problem-solving skills. By providing direct and honest feedback, you can enhance team performance and foster a culture of continual improvement. This approach will not only benefit your team but also contribute to achieving top results.

news.headline: Aspocomp Group CEO Manu Skyttä reported share-based incentive transaction on March 21, 2025 at 1:20 p.m.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, at 1:20 p.m., a transaction was made by Management of Aspocomp Group Plc. The individual involved is Manu Skyttä, holding the position of Chief Executive Officer within Aspocomp Group Oyj. The legal entity identifier (LEI) for Aspocomp Group Oyj is 743700W8ZIJAMXWWWD26. This transaction is categorized as an INITIAL NOTIFICATION with the reference number 101193/5/4.

news.headline: PIPA introduces Digital Extruder platform for food industry innovation. Connects formulation to production. SaaS offering to CPG companies.
news.summary: In Davis, California, on March 21, 2025, PIPA LLC unveiled the Digital Extruder platform, revolutionizing Enterprise Intelligence in the Food & Nutrition sector. The cutting-edge SaaS tool is designed to assist consumer packaged goods (CPG) firms in enhancing product development, boosting innovation, and streamlining processes.

news.headline: Brompton launches Canada's first Split Corp Class A Share ETF (CLSA) on TSX with final prospectus filed on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, Brompton Funds Limited disclosed the launch of the Brompton Split Corp. Class A Share ETF ("CLSA") on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). The final prospectus, dated March 14, 2025, was submitted to regulatory bodies in all Canadian provinces and territories. The ETF with the ticker symbol "CLSA" is set to begin trading today on the TSX.

news.headline: China's Cabinet Meeting: Will strengthen management of charging fees in violation of regulations
Brii Biosciences reports full-year 2024 financial results, acquires IP of BRII-179 phase 2b asset for HBV treatment combinations.
news.summary: Brii Bio has made a strategic move by acquiring the intellectual property of BRII-179, a Phase 2b asset. This asset has the potential to be combined with various HBV treatment methods for a cure. The data from ongoing late-stage studies further supports Brii Bio's strategy for achieving a functional cure for HBV through optimized combination therapies. This acquisition aligns with the company's goal of developing effective treatments for Hepatitis B virus infection.

news.headline: UK's PM Starmer: In close contact with partners on the ground
16th Annual Michigan Defense Expo (MDEX) 2025 in Warren, MI on April 8-10 - showcasing top defense leaders, innovators, and businesses. #Security #Economy
news.summary: Discover the significance of Michigan in enhancing America's security and economic prowess by participating in an event from April 8-10 in Warren, MI. Top defense leaders, innovators, and businesses from the USA will gather to shed light on this matter. The event is organized by the National Defense Industrial Association (NDIA) MI Chapter. Mark your calendars for this event on March 21, 2025.

news.headline: Applications open for ApolloMD's 2025 Emergency Medicine Scholarship for Residents. Deadline: June 15. Apply now!
news.summary: Atlanta, March 21, 2025 - Residents can now apply for ApolloMD's Emergency Medicine Scholarship for 2025. Interested individuals are encouraged to visit the Multichannel News Release for a comprehensive experience.

news.headline: Investors shift from risky crypto to safe assets amidst scams and uncertainty. Bitcoin's hot supply down 50% to 2.3%. SSR ratio at 8, signaling caution. Analysts predict Bitcoin could reach $160,000 to $180,000 by end of 2025.
news.summary: Investors in the crypto market are shifting towards safer digital asset investments amidst a wave of memecoin scams and macroeconomic uncertainty. Bitcoin's hot supply metric, which measures the aged BTC supply of one week or less, has decreased by over 50% from 5.9% in November to 2.3% in March. The stablecoin supply ratio (SSR) is at a four-month low of 8, signaling hesitation for significant new positions. Despite this caution, Bitcoin has outperformed major global assets since Trump's presidency. Analysts predict a positive price trajectory for Bitcoin in 2025, with estimates ranging from $160,000 to above $180,000. Speculative appetite is diminishing in the crypto market, leading to reduced liquidity and market participation. Analysts are optimistic about Bitcoin's price despite the current cautious market behavior.

news.headline: Sherritt extends maturities of note obligations in CBCA Transaction to strengthen capital structure. TSX:S.
news.summary: In Toronto, Sherritt International Corporation (TSX:S) disclosed an amendment to its initial transaction plan to prolong the maturity dates of its note obligations and enhance its capital structure. The amendment, known as the CBCA Transaction, will be executed through a corporate plan of arrangement (the CBCA Plan) under the Canada Business Corporations Act. This decision follows negotiations with specific stakeholders, aiming to fortify the corporation's financial standing.

news.headline: Ecolab meets water saving commitments in AI era, aiming to improve water use by 2030.
news.summary: In St. Paul, Minnesota, Ecolab, a renowned global sustainability leader specializing in water solutions and infection prevention services, has been actively contributing to addressing the growing importance of water in the era of artificial intelligence. Amid the ongoing digital transformation, Ecolab has remained committed to achieving its objectives and collaborating with clients to enhance profitability by promoting efficient water usage. With projections indicating a substantial increase in AI-driven development by the year 2030, the demand for additional water resources is expected to surge.

news.headline: CEO Paul Arling of Universal Electronics Inc. to retire in Scottsdale, Arizona.  #UEIC
news.summary: Scottsdale, Arizona-based Universal Electronics Inc. has disclosed that CEO Paul Arling is set to retire. The announcement was made recently. No specifics numbers were provided.

news.headline: LGT Private Banking picks CFRA as sole global equity research provider, assisting advisers and RMs in Europe.
news.summary: In a recent business move, LGT Private Banking has chosen CFRA as its sole third-party provider of fundamental equity research. This decision will benefit advisors and relationship managers (RMs) throughout Europe. The collaboration between the two entities is significant for the financial industry in Zurich, London, and New York. LGT Private Banking's choice of CFRA reflects the company's commitment to enhancing its services and providing high-quality research. It is a strategic decision that aims to improve the support and guidance offered to advisors and RMs.

news.headline: Redwire (RDW) gets regulatory approvals for acquiring Edge Autonomy in the space industry; includes antitrust review in US.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW), a prominent player in space infrastructure for the upcoming space economy, revealed today that it has successfully obtained all necessary regulatory clearances for the finalization of its acquisition of Edge Autonomy. These approvals incorporate the conclusion of the antitrust assessment under the Hart-Scott-Rodino Act in the U.S., along with foreign investment evaluations in Latvia, Canada, and the United Kingdom. The transaction is on track for completion.

news.headline: Precision BioSciences (Nasdaq: DTIL) to report Q4 & FY 2024 results on March 26, 2025. Focused on gene editing therapies.
news.summary: Precision BioSciences, Inc., based in Durham, N.C., is a gene editing company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol DTIL. Specializing in in vivo gene editing therapies, the company utilizes its proprietary ARCUS® platform to develop programs focused on gene elimination, insertion, and excision. Precision BioSciences will release its financial results for Q4 and the fiscal year 2024, along with a business update, on March 26, 2025. This date marks an important milestone for the clinical stage company.

news.headline: CytoSorbents delays earnings release to March 31, 2025, affirms financial results for Q4 2024 year-end, expects regulatory decisions on DrugSorb™-ATR in 2025.
news.summary: A company headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey, called CytoSorbents has reiterated the initial financial results for the quarter and full year that concluded on December 31, 2024. They anticipate regulatory determinations regarding the marketing applications for DrugSorb™-ATR in 2025. The news was announced on March 21, 2025, without specifying the source.

news.headline: Else Nutrition to hold conference call on Mar 31, 2025 to discuss financial results. Scheduled at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on March 21, 2025, ELSE NUTRITION HOLDINGS INC. (BABY) (BABYF) (0YL.F) revealed they intend to conduct a business update conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on March 31, 2025. The call aims to delve into the Company's financial outcomes, marking a significant event for shareholders and investors.

news.headline: New MY DR NOW Clinic in Gilbert now open daily with extended hours, 7 days a week, at 3546 South Power Road Suite 101.
news.summary: In Gilbert, Arizona, a new primary care clinic is set to open on March 21, 2025. The clinic, operated by MY DR NOW, aims to provide convenient medical services to residents. Situated at 3546 South Power Road Suite 101, the facility will offer extended hours and operate seven days a week to accommodate busy schedules. This initiative seeks to make quality healthcare more accessible to the community.

news.headline: Automotive industry in 2025 adopts Visual Language Actions for ADAS, enhancing scene reasoning for autonomous driving.
news.summary: Berlin, news from March 21, 2025 reveals that the automotive sector in 2025 is adopting Visual Language Actions (VLAs) to improve ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance Systems) and self-driving capabilities. VLAs provide superior scene understanding and generalization compared to conventional methods, marking a significant advancement in this field.

news.headline: Fast Guard Service in Fort Lauderdale improves security for businesses with enhanced communication and transparency, offering 24/7 support. Leader in security guard services.
news.summary: Fast Guard Service, the top provider of security guard services in the nation, is enhancing the connection between standard security measures and exceptional customer service in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. This initiative is driven by a commitment to accountability, integrity, and round-the-clock support. The company's approach aims to address the needs of business owners by offering comprehensive security solutions. This move comes as part of the company’s mission to elevate industry standards and deliver unparalleled services.

news.headline: Galien Foundation honors 2025 Modi Prix Galien India winners for life sciences innovations in New Delhi.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, in New Delhi, the Galien Foundation recognized winners with a prestigious award for their recent breakthroughs in the field of life sciences. The foundation, renowned worldwide for acknowledging pioneers in this area, commended the recipients for their exceptional work in advancing life sciences.

news.headline: New Found Gold Corp. files 2024 year-end financial documents, including annual statements for December 31.
news.summary: Vancouver, British Columbia - March 21, 2025 - In an update by New Found Gold Corp. (TSXV: NFG) (NYSE-A: NFGC), the company has disclosed the submission of its annual financial records for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. This includes the Management's Discussion and Analysis document, marking an important development for stakeholders.

news.headline: Perpetua Resources supports Trump's Executive Order to boost US mineral production, reduce dependence.corp.
news.summary: Perpetua Resources Corp., a company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol PPTA and on TSX as PPTA, based in Boise, Idaho, made a statement on March 21, 2025, regarding President Donald Trump's Executive Order. The order aims to boost American mineral production and decrease the country's dependence on foreign sources. This move is significant for Perpetua Resources as it aligns with the company's objectives. President Trump's order intends to enhance the domestic production of minerals critical for various industries. The order also seeks to lessen U.S. reliance on overseas suppliers for essential minerals. This is a substantial development for Perpetua Resources as it could create opportunities for the company in this sector.

news.headline: Upbound Group, Inc. declares $0.39 quarterly cash dividend for Q2 of 2025, payable on April 22, to common stockholders.
news.summary: Plano, Texas-based organization Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD), a prominent player in providing inclusive financial solutions for underserved consumers through technology and data-driven approaches, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.39 for the second quarter of 2025. The dividend payout is scheduled for April 22, 2025, for common stockholders registered by the end of the business day.

news.headline: Nissan partners with sushi master and knifemaker to create Z NISMO Precision Sushi Knife, combining tradition and innovation.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, Nissan Design America teamed up with sushi master Chef Hiro and knifemaker Kiryu to craft the Z NISMO Precision Sushi Knife. This collaboration blends the precision and expertise of Japanese knifemaking with the performance of the Nissan Z. The knife celebrates the shared DNA between the Z and Japanese tradition. The Nissan Z NISMO is known for its lightning-quick shifts and independent ignition spark timing system, designed for peak performance. This unique knife represents a fusion of automotive excellence and culinary artistry, showcasing the intricate craftsmanship that goes into both the Nissan Z and traditional Japanese knives.

news.headline: Agrify reported financial results for Q4 and full year 2024, being a leading cannabis company.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, on March 21, 2025, Agrify Corporation (Nasdaq: AGFY), a prominent supplier of creative solutions for the cannabis and hemp sectors, divulged its financial outcomes for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group adds NIGHTINGALE HEALTH OYJ to OTCQX, trading under NHLTY and NGHLF (12,000 securities listed).
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that NIGHTINGALE HEALTH OYJ, a preventative healthcare company, is now eligible to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. The platform, overseen by OTC Markets Group Inc., facilitates trading for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. NIGHTINGALE HEALTH OYJ is listed under Nasdaq Helsinki as HEALTH and is also available under OTCQX tickers NHLTY and NGHLF. This move signifies the company's expansion into the OTCQX® Best Market to boost trading opportunities and visibility in the market.

news.headline: PyroGenesis updates on Varennes Carbon Recycling project. Supports heavy industry in energy transition. 100% electric plasma processes.
news.summary: PyroGenesis Inc., a high-tech company focused on all-electric plasma processes, sustainable solutions, and supporting heavy industry in energy transition, emission reduction, and waste management, shared an update on its participation in the Varennes Carbon Recycling (VCR) project amid developments related to Varennes Cellulosic Ethanol LP (VCE). The company's stock symbols are TSX: PYR, OTCQX: PYRGF, and FRA: 8PY1. The announcement was made on March 21, 2025, from Montreal.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has reached a record low of 3.5%, the lowest it has been in the past 50 years. The economy also added 266,000 jobs in the same period, surpassing economists' expectations. This growth in job creation has been attributed to various factors, including strong consumer spending and increased business investments. The stock market has responded positively to this news, with major indexes hitting new record highs. Overall, these numbers indicate a robust and thriving economy with low unemployment and significant job growth.

Nanomi B.V., a subsidiary of Lupin Limited, wins CMO Award for Life Science Leadership in Drug Delivery.

Consensys challenges CFPB's rule on unhosted wallets, demands withdrawal or revision to exclude crypto sector.
news.summary: The software firm specializing in Ethereum projects anticipates that the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) will either remove the interpretive rule related to cryptocurrency from its agenda or make alterations to exclude the crypto industry.

Health PR Newswire recapped 14 press releases, highlights being semaglutide data and parakeet-human brain parallels.
news.summary: This week, a variety of healthcare press releases stood out, such as the latest semaglutide cardiovascular data and the unexpected similarities found between parakeet and human brain activity. The information was shared via PR Newswire in New York on March 21, 2025. Among the numerous press releases shared, these two stories gained attention for their significance in the healthcare field. The semaglutide cardiovascular data revealed groundbreaking findings, while the discovery of parallels in brain activity between parakeets and humans sparked intrigue. Overall, these highlights from the press releases shed light on important advancements and discoveries in healthcare research.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures dip as market awaits a bullish signal; Micron leads earnings movers. Six stocks to watch.
news.summary: On Thursday, the stock market's rally attempt saw a slight decline as it kept looking for a bullish signal. Micron was at the forefront among the late movers in earnings. Dow Jones Futures dropped in response as the market continued to wait for a positive indication. Investors are keeping an eye on six particular stocks.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fall as market awaits bullish signal, Berkshire Hathaway on hot streak before quadruple witching day.
news.summary: Stock market futures experienced a decline, lacking a positive indicator for bulls. The upcoming Friday marks a quadruple witching day, potentially impacting market activity. Berkshire Hathaway, a company led by Warren Buffett, showed strong performance recently. Buffett is aiming to continue this success streak. The article discusses the current situation of Dow Jones futures, highlighting uncertainties in the market and Buffett's influential presence.

news.headline: German Finance Ministry Spokesperson on Eventin Tanker: Customs measures have not yet been finalized in a legally binding manner, further travel is prohibited
India in talks with the US for a mutually beneficial trade deal - Reports

Ethereum lags behind Bitcoin due to inflationary issues and Solana's meme coins. Bitcoin's market share increased to 60%, while Ethereum's decreased to 8%. Ethereum's EIP-1559 aims to burn more Ether to combat inflation.
news.summary: Ethereum has experienced a notable decline in market share, contracting by 39% over the past year, from 16% to 8%. In contrast, Bitcoin saw a 32% increase in value, reaching an all-time high of $109,000 and expanding its market share from 52% to 60%. The widening gap between the two cryptocurrencies has raised questions about Ethereum's position in the hierarchy. Analysts attribute Ethereum's downturn to its economic model, particularly highlighting issues with scalability and the effects of the EIP-1559 upgrade. Under this upgrade, more Ether can be burned for deflation, but further scaling is necessary to support on-chain applications. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Chinese Communist Party-backed publication calls for China to accelerate stablecoin development in response to rising influence of USD-pegged cryptocurrencies. Op-ed stresses importance of expanding international currency status of Chinese Yuan. Stablecoins like Tether and USD Coin gaining traction in sectors like trading and decentralized finance, reinforcing USD's dominance. China urged to strengthen stablecoin development.
news.summary: A Chinese Communist Party-backed publication has urged China to hasten its stablecoin development and enhance the global status of the Chinese Yuan in response to the growing influence of U.S. dollar-pegged cryptocurrencies. According to an op-ed in Study Times, stablecoins like Tether (USDT) and USD Coin (USDC) are playing a significant role in connecting traditional and digital currencies. These stablecoins are being widely used for trading on cryptocurrency exchanges, in decentralized finance, and in emerging markets for wealth protection, reinforcing the dominance of the dollar as an international currency. The op-ed, originally in Chinese, emphasized the need for China to strengthen its stablecoin initiatives to keep pace with this trend.

news.headline: Turkey prepares for escalating tensions as nationwide protests loom, following recent unrest. #Turkey #protests
